abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Relish in Blood (Mature Nephilim)
abilities.text: After resolving an attack action that damaged a model, this model may remove a Glutted token to replace itself with a Mature Nephilim and heal 4. If it does not have a Glutted token, it instead gains a Glutted token.

actions.name: Deadly Claws
actions.effects: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Pick the Bones
triggers.text: After killing, this model may declare the Interact action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: Blacken the Skies
actions.costs_and_restrictions: All friendly models within (t)2" with this action that have already activated this turn may declare this action.
actions.effects: Place this model within range. This model may not declare the Interact action this activation.

triggers.name: Inspiration
triggers.text: This model gains a Focused token.
